action.name: Action
action.description: Fast-paced action games to test your reflexes
action.intro: Get your heart pumping with our collection of fast-paced action games. From precision aim trainers and zombie shooters to classic Contra run-and-gun action, each game tests your reflexes and hand-eye coordination. No downloads, no sign-ups — just instant browser-based thrills.

faq.q: What action games can I play for free?
faq.a: LeYou offers a wide range of action games including Aim Trainer, Zombie Shooter, Contra, Space Shooter, Tank Battle, and Boxing. All are free to play in your browser with no download required.

faq.q: Are these action games suitable for quick sessions?
faq.a: Absolutely — most action games on LeYou are designed for quick pick-up-and-play sessions. Games like Aim Trainer and Asteroid Dodge last 30-60 seconds per round, perfect for short breaks.

puzzle.name: Puzzle
puzzle.intro: Challenge your mind with our collection of free online puzzle games. From classic Sudoku and 2048 to daily Wordle challenges, each game sharpens your logic, memory, and problem-solving skills. No download needed — just click and play in your browser.

faq.q: What are the best free puzzle games to play online?
faq.a: LeYou offers 15+ free online puzzle games including 2048, Sudoku, Tetris, Minesweeper, and Wordle. All games run directly in your browser with no download required.

faq.q: Can I play puzzle games without downloading anything?
faq.a: Yes — every puzzle game on LeYou is HTML5 based and works instantly in your browser. No downloads, no plugins, no sign-ups needed.

faq.q: Are there daily puzzle challenges?
faq.a: Yes! Try our daily Wordle challenge and daily Sudoku — a new puzzle every day to keep your brain sharp.

arcade.name: Arcade
arcade.intro: Relive the golden age of gaming with our collection of classic arcade games. Play Pac-Man, Space Invaders, Breakout, Pinball, and Fruit Ninja — all faithfully recreated for your browser. Instant play, zero downloads, endless nostalgia.

faq.q: What classic arcade games are available?
faq.a: LeYou features classic arcade games like Pac-Man, Space Invaders, Breakout, Pinball, Bomberman, and Fruit Ninja. All are browser-based with no download needed.

faq.q: Can I play arcade games on my phone?
faq.a: Yes — all LeYou arcade games are mobile-friendly HTML5 games that work on smartphones, tablets, and desktop browsers.

sports.name: Sports
sports.intro: Compete in a variety of sports games online for free. Play Soccer Stars, Bowling, Air Hockey, Boxing, and Pong against AI opponents. Each game captures the thrill of real sports competition in quick, browser-based sessions.

faq.q: What sports games can I play online?
faq.a: LeYou offers Soccer Stars, Bowling, Air Hockey, Boxing, Pong, and more. All sports games are free and playable directly in your browser.

faq.q: Do I need special equipment to play sports games?
faq.a: No — all LeYou sports games use just your keyboard or touchscreen. No controllers, no downloads, no special hardware needed.

racing.name: Racing
racing.description: Speed and thrills on the racetrack
racing.intro: Feel the need for speed with our collection of racing and driving games. Dodge traffic in Speed Racing, race down endless slopes in Slope Run, and push your reflexes to the limit. All games are instant-play HTML5 with no download.

faq.q: What racing games are available on LeYou?
faq.a: LeYou features Speed Racing, Slope Run, and other driving challenges. Each game tests your reflexes and driving skills in fast-paced races.

faq.q: Can I play racing games on mobile?
faq.a: Yes — all racing games are fully optimized for mobile browsers. Tilt, tap, or use keyboard controls depending on the game.

casual.name: Casual
casual.intro: Unwind with our collection of casual games perfect for relaxing breaks. From addictive idle games like Cookie Clicker and Idle Miner to classic favorites like Doodle Jump and Flappy Bird, there's something for everyone. Play instantly in your browser.

faq.q: What casual games can I play to relax?
faq.a: LeYou offers relaxing casual games like Cookie Clicker, Idle Miner, Doodle Jump, Flappy Bird, and Color Match. All are free and require no download.

faq.q: Are idle games really free to play?
faq.a: Yes — all idle games on LeYou including Cookie Clicker and Idle Miner are completely free. No in-app purchases, no hidden fees.

strategy.name: Strategy
strategy.intro: Put your strategic thinking to the test with our collection of strategy games. Command armies in Tank Battle, build defenses in Tower Defense, and outmaneuver opponents in Chess and Checkers. Every move counts in these browser-based brain teasers.

faq.q: What strategy games are available online?
faq.a: LeYou offers strategy games including Chess variants, Checkers, Tower Defense, Tank Battle, Connect Four, and Battleship. All are free to play in your browser.

faq.q: Do strategy games have AI opponents?
faq.a: Most LeYou strategy games feature AI opponents with adjustable difficulty, letting you practice and improve at your own pace.

faq.q: Can I play strategy games against friends?
faq.a: Many LeYou strategy games support pass-and-play on the same device, letting you challenge friends and family in classic board games.

adventure.name: Adventure
adventure.intro: Embark on thrilling adventures with our collection of adventure games. Navigate platforming challenges in Platform Runner, solve mysteries in Escape Room, and explore pixel-art worlds. Each game offers a unique journey — all from your browser.

faq.q: What adventure games can I play for free?
faq.a: LeYou features Platform Runner, Escape Room, Dino Runner, and more adventure games. All are HTML5 games that run instantly in any browser.

faq.q: Are adventure games suitable for kids?
faq.a: Yes — LeYou adventure games are family-friendly with no violent content. Games like Dino Runner and Platform Runner are great for players of all ages.

board.name: Board
board.description: Chess and card game battles of wit
board.intro: Challenge your wits with classic board and card games. Play Chess, Checkers, Gomoku, Reversi, Solitaire, Poker, and Blackjack against AI opponents. Every game is a battle of strategy and skill — free, no download, instant play.

faq.q: What board and card games are available?
faq.a: LeYou offers Chess, Checkers, Gomoku, Reversi, Solitaire (Klondike), Blackjack, Texas Hold'em Poker, Battleship, Connect Four, and more. All free.

faq.q: Can I play card games against AI?
faq.a: Yes — all card and board games on LeYou feature AI opponents, allowing you to practice and improve your skills anytime.

faq.q: Is there a way to play card games with friends?
faq.a: Yes — many board games support pass-and-play mode on the same device, perfect for playing with friends and family.
